ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount after any discounts applied */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of discount applied during the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the orders table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items purchased */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price of each item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" TEXT /* Value of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

Percentage of discount applied during the purchase
